decision.summary: No new action: the daily 77k dip is now the clean same-day thesis trade, while the weekly 80k reach remains open as the structural upside alternative.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77523.95, only 0.45% above the 24h low, with shorts still dominant and open interest contracting, which keeps supporting the bearish intraday thesis behind the active daily 77k dip. That position has strengthened to about 71.5%, so the same-day downside view is already being expressed well. The weekly 80k reach remains open around 35%, still representing the structural upside alternative, but it is not weak enough to discard and not strong enough for take-profit. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. For new entries, the next bearish daily, 76k dip, is only about 26% and too weak to justify a second downside daily, while the nearest upside daily, 79k reach, is only around 21% and would be a low-quality countertrend momentum trade. On the weekly board, the nearest downside strike, 72k dip, is only about 6.5%, so there is still no clean bearish weekly vehicle to replace or complement the existing weekly 80k reach. The old weekly 72k dip remains discarded_for_slot and requires no action. The correct action is to hold the live daily 77k dip and the weekly 80k reach without opening anything new.
